script.name: lib.cycrow.table.build
script.description: Library: Build a menu table from data array
script.sourceplaintext:
$DEFINE.HEADINGSIZE = 5 $DEFINE.ROWSIZE = 5
$headings = $a.data[4] $headings.count = size of array $headings $headings.count = $headings.count / $DEFINE.HEADINGSIZE
$gap = $a.data[2]
$text.col = array alloc: size=$headings.count $pos = 0 $i = 0 $array.pos = 0 while $i < $headings.count $heading.len = $headings[$array.pos] inc $array.pos = $heading.name = $headings[$array.pos] inc $array.pos = inc $array.pos = $heading.right = $headings[$array.pos] inc $array.pos = inc $array.pos = skip if $heading.name $heading.name = ' '
$text = create custom menu column string, position=$pos length=$heading.len right=$heading.right colour=null text=$heading.name $text.col[$i] = $text $pos = $pos + $heading.len + $gap inc $i = end
if $a.data[1] add clickable heading: menu=$a.menu, text=$text.col, id=$a.name, allow empty=[FALSE] else add custom menu heading to array $a.menu: title=$text.col end
$do.icon = $a.data[3] $rows = $a.data[5] $row.count = size of array $rows $row.count = $row.count / ( $headings.count + $DEFINE.HEADINGSIZE )
$search.value = $a.data[10] $search.table = $a.data[9]
$filtered = 0 $added = 0 $array.pos = 0 $r = 0 while $r < $row.count $filter = [TRUE] inc $r = $icon = $rows[$array.pos] inc $array.pos = $return = $rows[$array.pos] inc $array.pos = $object = $rows[$array.pos] inc $array.pos = $sidemenu = $rows[$array.pos] inc $array.pos = $description = $rows[$array.pos] inc $array.pos =
if $do.icon $count = $headings.count + 1 $text.col = array alloc: size=$count $move = 10 else $text.col = array alloc: size=$headings.count end
$pos = 0 $i = 0 while $i < $headings.count $text = $rows[$array.pos] inc $array.pos = $h.pos = ( $i * $DEFINE.HEADINGSIZE ) $heading.len = $headings[$h.pos] $h.pos = ( $i * $DEFINE.HEADINGSIZE ) + 3 $heading.right = $headings[$h.pos] if $move $pos = $pos + $move $heading.len = $heading.len - $move $move = 0 end $colour = null $col.pos = $pos $col.len = $heading.len if is datatype[ $text ] == DATATYPE_ARRAY $tmp = $text[0] if $tmp == '#SPLIT#' $text.i = size of array $text while $text.i > 4 dec $text.i = $t = $text[$text.i] dec $text.i = $colour = $text[$text.i] dec $text.i = $col.pos = $text[$text.i] $col.len = $heading.len - $col.pos $col.pos = $pos + $col.pos $t = create custom menu column string, position=$col.pos length=$col.len right=$heading.right colour=$colour text=$t append $t to array $text.col end $colour = $text[2] $col.pos = $text[1] $col.len = $heading.len - $col.pos $col.pos = $pos + $col.pos $text = $text[3] end end
$text = create custom menu column string, position=$col.pos length=$col.len right=$heading.right colour=$colour text=$text $text.col[$i] = $text $pos = $pos + $heading.len + $gap
if $search.table AND $search.value $h.pos = ( $i * $DEFINE.HEADINGSIZE ) + 4 $heading.id = $headings[$h.pos] if $search.table[$heading.id] do if case insensitive string match, is $search.value in $text $filter = [FALSE] end end
inc $i = end
if $filter AND $search.table AND $search.value inc $filtered = else if $do.icon do if is datatype[ $icon ] == DATATYPE_NULL $icon = ' ' $text = create custom menu column string, position=0 length=10 right=[FALSE] colour=null text=$icon $text.col[$i] = $text end
do if $sidemenu set menu line option: $a.menu, side menu=$sidemenu do if $description set menu line option: $a.menu, description=$description if $object
if is datatype[ $object ] == DATATYPE_WARE do if $a.data[6] set menu line option: $a.menu, video display ware=$object if $a.data[7] $voice.id = get text id: ware=$object inc $voice.id = set menu line option: $a.menu, voiced description page=[Page.ObjDesc], id=$voice.id end else if $object -> exists if $a.data[6] if $object -> is of class Station $waretype = $object -> get ware type code of object set menu line option: $a.menu, video display ware=$waretype else set menu line option: $a.menu, video display object=$object end end if $a.data[7] $voice.page = $object ->get object voice page $voice.id = $object ->get object voice id inc $voice.id = set menu line option: $a.menu, voiced description page=$voice.page, id=$voice.id end end end inc $added = add custom menu item to array $a.menu: text=$text.col returnvalue=$return end end
if $filtered AND ! $added $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=689 add non selectable menu item: $a.menu, text=$read.text else if $a.data[8] if not $added $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=689 add non selectable menu item: $a.menu, text=$read.text end end
if $a.data[9] $search.table = $a.data[9] do if size of table $search.table set menu option: $a.menu, allow searching=[TRUE] end
return $a.menu

line.text: create custom menu column string, position=
add custom menu heading to array
create custom menu column string, position=
create custom menu column string, position=
create custom menu column string, position=
get ware type code of object
add custom menu item to array

sval.val: Library: Build a menu table from data array
